name: Wild Berries
description: A little sour, a little suspicious, still technically food.

name: Fresh Water
description: Water. Pretty important, honestly.

name: Clean Water
description: Boiled, cleaner, slightly less risky.

name: Basic Bandage
description: A simple dressing for small injuries.

name: Field Knife
description: Handy for cutting, carving, and looking vaguely prepared.

name: Basic Fishing Pole
description: A humble pole for catching humble fish.

name: Basic Fishing Net
description: A simple net for scooping up smaller catches.

name: Passive Fishing Line
description: A set-and-check fishing line for passive catches.

name: Worm Bait
description: Irresistible to fish. Less appealing to everyone else.

name: Scrap Wood
description: Warped but still useful wood pieces.

name: Fiber Bundle
description: Plant fibers for building and crafting.

name: Rope Bundle
description: Simple rope for building, traps, and boat work.

name: Mold Sample Jar
description: Used to collect fungal samples for study or alarming accidents.

name: Bio Fuel Cell
description: A cheap fuel source for the station boat.

name: Field Alcohol
description: Sanitizes, preserves, and occasionally improves morale.

name: Shredded Chameleon Skin
description: Used in breeding additives with stealth properties.

name: Chameleon Juice
description: A breeding additive that nudges offspring toward camouflage.

name: Luminous Spores
description: A volatile additive associated with glow traits and weird outcomes.

name: Shell Powder
description: Ground shell used to toughen offspring and reinforce habitats.

name: Mud Minnow
description: A small river fish. Nutritious if you don't think too hard about it.

name: Reed Carp
description: A bigger, more respectable catch from the reeds.

name: Drift Crab
description: Snappy, ugly, and delicious if properly cooked.

name: Bog Perch
description: A murky wetland fish with a surprisingly clean taste.

name: Mire Eel
description: An oily eel from the swamp channels.

name: Mud Shrimp
description: Tiny, weird, and still edible.

name: Silt Flounder
description: A flat mud-loving fish with decent meat.

name: Old Boot
description: Technically a catch. Morally a disappointment.

name: Broken Lure
description: The remains of somebody else's optimism.

name: Algae Bundle
description: Wet plant matter useful in compost, feed, or regrettable recipes.

name: Frog Lure
description: A lively lure suited to swamp predators.

name: Dock Turtle Egg
description: A fragile egg from a river turtle nesting near the dock.

name: Field Shovel
description: A compact shovel for digging, planting, and field prep.

name: Wild Berry Seeds
description: Seeds that can be planted for berry-growing tests.

name: Reedgrass Seeds
description: Viable reedgrass seed heads for planting fiber crops.

name: Improvised Snare Trap
description: A rough reusable land trap for small and medium marsh creatures.

name: Reed Fish Trap
description: A woven water trap for passive aquatic catches.

name: Basic Cage Trap
description: A sturdier trap with better odds and room for larger land animals.
